title: URO Tier 1 — T5: Voxel group materialization + box_simulator + OccupancyGrid + Maple Ridge bundle v1.0.0
description: Fifth child deliverable of URO Tier 1 parent arc d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-ros-overlay-foundation per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §5 + §8.T5. Extends Project Intake Stages 4/5/6 (per DEC-010) to materialize ROOM, LEVEL, SYSTEM, TAKT_ZONE, and DECISION_ZONE voxel groups into the voxel_groups table landed at T1. Adds box_simulator_node.py ROS 2 node reading from Postgres and publishing /box/groups/snapshot (latched, occasional deltas) + per-level /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/<level> as standard nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid. Authors Maple Ridge curated bundle v1.0.0 (bundle.json + decisions.json + staff.json + takt-schedule.json + seppa-context.json) with explicit group definitions, served from DO Spaces under demo-library/maple-ridge/. Validation proof-point: external ROS subscriber (stock Nav2 stack or test harness) consumes /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/level_2 and reports valid map metadata — 'robots can use our voxel data'. Closes T5's two original P1 preconditions (already cleared: FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 closed via PR 1.2 EB c32c7b14 2026-06-08; FU-EB-USER-WALK-2026-05-22-VOXEL-WRONG-LEVELS-DECISIONS-ORPHANED-1 closed). Full dev → staging → prod escalation procedural embedded in validation.postMerge[].

outputs.description: box_simulator_node.py — ROS 2 node in luhtech_uro_sim package. Subscribes to Postgres voxel_groups table (via psycopg2 or async pool). Publishes /box/groups/snapshot (latched QoS, full group set on connect) at scenario start, deltas on group status changes. Publishes /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/<level_id> for each LEVEL group at 0.5 Hz (configurable). Each topic uses nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid stock message type. Reads rolled_up_status from voxel_groups + computes occupancy map per the opinionated mapping authored in T1 strategy: PLANNED→0, IN_PROGRESS→50, BLOCKED→100, COMPLETE→0. Logged to rosbag2 via existing scenario_controller_node tie-in (T2 substrate).
acceptanceCriteria: box_simulator_node.py registered in luhtech_uro_sim/setup.py entry_points (ros2 run luhtech_uro_sim box_simulator_node succeeds)
ros2 topic list shows /box/groups/snapshot, /box/groups/deltas, /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/<level_id> for each materialized LEVEL group
ros2 interface show on /box/groups/snapshot matches luhtech_msgs/VoxelGroupArray landed at T1
ros2 topic echo /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/level_2 returns valid nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid with non-zero data array and valid info.resolution, info.width, info.height, info.origin
ros2 bag info on a recorded .mcap shows /box/groups/snapshot + /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/* topics
Node respects ROS_DOMAIN_ID isolation; foxglove_bridge surfaces these topics to browser WS client

outputs.description: Project Intake Pipeline (DEC-010 Stages 4/5/6) extended to materialize voxel groups into voxel_groups table at intake time. Stage 4 IFC service materializes ROOM and LEVEL groups from IFC building storeys + spaces. Stage 5 takt service materializes TAKT_ZONE groups from takt-schedule.json zone definitions (coordinate-range UPDATEs). Stage 6 decision service materializes DECISION_ZONE groups from decisions.json clash zones. SYSTEM groups materialized from IFC system classifications (MEP discipline) at Stage 4. All stages idempotent (upsert on (project_id, group_type, group_key)).
acceptanceCriteria: voxel-groups-materializer.service.ts handles ROOM, LEVEL, SYSTEM, TAKT_ZONE, DECISION_ZONE materialization with type-routed strategy
Stage 4/5/6 services call voxel-groups-materializer.service at the documented pipeline hook points (per DEC-010)
Materialization is idempotent: running provision against the same bundle twice produces identical voxel_groups row counts
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voxel_groups WHERE project_id = dc1eaa5b-7553-46ec-92a5-e20762a60c71 GROUP BY group_type returns expected counts matching Maple Ridge bundle group-definitions.json
Unit tests in voxel-groups-materializer.service.test.ts cover all 5 group types + idempotency case + empty bundle case
TypeScript compile passes; ESLint passes; vitest passes for new + modified files

outputs.description: Read API at /api/uro/voxel-groups for box_simulator_node consumption (and future SEPPA/UI consumers). GET /api/uro/voxel-groups?project_id=<uuid> returns full group set with rolled_up_status. GET /api/uro/voxel-groups?project_id=<uuid>&since=<timestamp> returns deltas. Server-Sent Events on /api/uro/voxel-groups/stream for live updates (Redis pub/sub backed). Authenticated via existing api-gateway JWT middleware (not viewer-token — this is internal service-to-service).
acceptanceCriteria: voxel-groups.route.ts exposes GET / + GET ?since= + GET /stream (SSE)
Authenticated curl returns 200 + valid JSON matching voxel_groups Prisma schema shape (group_id, project_id, group_type, group_key, rolled_up_status, geometry, materialized_at)
Unauthenticated curl returns 401
SSE stream emits update events on voxel_groups row mutations (NOTIFY/LISTEN or Redis pub/sub bridge)
Vitest covers happy path + auth-failure path + delta path
Route registered in apps/api-gateway/src/routes/uro/index.ts router list

outputs.description: nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid producer logic in box_simulator_node.py. Per-level: query voxel_groups for LEVEL = <level_id> + child voxels with rolled_up_status. Compute opinionated occupancy map per pre-spec decision: PLANNED→0 (free), IN_PROGRESS→50 (partial), BLOCKED→100 (occupied), COMPLETE→0 (free). Header.frame_id set to building local frame; info.resolution = 0.1m (COARSE tier per BOX Architecture); info.origin set from voxel_grid bbox_min. Documented explicitly: no published Nav2-vs-rolled_up_status convention exists; this mapping is authored opinion per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §2.
acceptanceCriteria: occupancy_grid_producer logic in box_simulator_node.py is unit-tested in test_box_simulator.py with synthetic voxel_groups inputs
Output OccupancyGrid satisfies nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid: data[] length == info.width × info.height, values in {-1, 0..100}
info.resolution = 0.1, info.width and info.height derived from voxel_grid bbox at COARSE tier
info.origin populated from voxel_grids.bbox_min with quaternion identity orientation
Status mapping documented in box_simulator_node.py docstring + .dlp/deliverables/.../SPEC.md (cites strategy doc as authored opinion)
Per-level topics use frame_id pattern 'building/level_<n>' for downstream tf2 chain consumption

outputs.description: Maple Ridge curated bundle v1.0.0 authored. demo-library/maple-ridge/bundle.json: bundle_type=DEMO, bundle_version=1.0.0, references existing IFC files at ifc/ + decisions.json + staff.json + takt-schedule.json + seppa-context.json + group-definitions.json. decisions.json: 5 canonical decisions with pre-computed ai_analysis (per Q6 ECTROPY-PROJECT-INTAKE-ARCHITECTURE), each anchored to specific clash coords mapped to primary_voxel_urn (canonical urn:luhtech:ectropy:voxel:* form post-PR-1.1). staff.json: 10 staff with L1–L6 authority levels per DEC-005 cascade. takt-schedule.json: zone definitions matching Maple Ridge IPD takt (week 4, Level 0 complete, Level 1 active with MEP clash at Grid B3, Level 2 planned). seppa-context.json: project_context JSONB shape for SEPPA session init (per Q1 architecture). group-definitions.json: explicit ROOM/LEVEL/SYSTEM/TAKT_ZONE/DECISION_ZONE definitions consumed by Stage 4/5/6 materializer.
acceptanceCriteria: demo-library/maple-ridge/bundle.json validates against canonical bundle.schema.json (per schemas-refs)
decisions.json contains 5 entries; each has primary_voxel_urn in canonical urn:luhtech:ectropy:voxel:* form
Each decision's ai_analysis JSONB has the documented shape (per SEPPA template at PART VI of ECTROPY-PROJECT-INTAKE-ARCHITECTURE)
staff.json contains 10 entries spanning L1–L6 authority levels (no L7 since L7 = stakeholder assembly, not staff)
takt-schedule.json zone coordinates align with Maple Ridge IFC voxel_grids bbox
group-definitions.json produces deterministic group materialization (running provision twice produces identical voxel_groups counts)
Bundle SHA256 + bytes captured in bundle.json metadata block; IFC file SHA256s populated from existing ifc-extraction-cache/maple-ridge/*.json manifests
All bundle JSON files ajv-validated against their respective canonical schemas with 3-flag form (per memory #14)

outputs.description: End-to-end integration test: provision Maple Ridge bundle v1.0.0 against dev DB; verify voxel_groups materialized; launch uro-sim container; verify /box/groups/snapshot + /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/level_2 published; verify browser WS client (from T3) receives messages and renders groups. Captures _msg/ audit bundle per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §9: BUILD.log, TOPICS.txt, PROBES.txt, DB-STATE.txt, SCREENSHOTS/, METRICS.txt, CANARY.txt, BAG-VALIDATION.txt, L4-CHECKLIST.md.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/admin/provision-demo-user with bundle_id=maple-ridge-commerce-centre, bundle_version=1.0.0, user_email=t5-validation@luh.tech returns 201
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voxel_groups WHERE project_id = <returned project_id> returns expected count matching group-definitions.json
uro-sim container starts on dev; docker exec uro-sim ros2 topic list shows expected topics
Browser /dev/uro page renders group boundaries at building scale with colors matching rolled_up_status; manual screen capture
Provision duration <8 minutes (target per PART VI architecture, Demo bundle)
_msg/ audit bundle artifacts present per §9 canonical structure

outputs.description: External ROS subscriber proof-point: stock Nav2 map_server or rviz2 instance subscribes to /box/voxels/occupancy_grid/level_2 from cloud foxglove_bridge (via authenticated WS) and reports valid map metadata. Proves the 'robots can use our voxel data' claim for technical/robotics-savvy audience (Dusty/Locus/6River/Boston Dynamics Orbit). Test harness: docker-compose run stock ros:jazzy-ros-base container with rviz2 + nav2_map_server; subscribe to the cloud topic via foxglove_bridge_ros2_client; capture screenshot + map_server log.
acceptanceCriteria: Stock ros:jazzy container connects to foxglove_bridge on dev via @foxglove/ws-protocol with valid viewer JWT (LuhTechViewerToken shape per T1)
rviz2 OccupancyGrid display renders the published grid without errors
nav2_map_server reports valid map metadata (resolution + dimensions + origin + frame_id) in its log
Screenshot of rviz2 + map_server log captured in _msg/SCREENSHOTS/ + _msg/PROBES.txt
L4-CHECKLIST.md item 'External ROS subscriber consumes occupancy_grid' marked PASS with evidence link

outputs.description: Browser viewer renders Maple Ridge groups at building scale with correct colors. Uses T4 VoxelGroupOverlay extension + display-rules.json. All 5 group types (ROOM, LEVEL, SYSTEM, TAKT_ZONE, DECISION_ZONE) render with type-priority overlap resolution per T4 display rules (highest-priority-wins). Manual + Playwright e2e test capture.
acceptanceCriteria: Playwright test in apps/web-dashboard/tests/uro/groups-render.spec.ts navigates to /dev/uro, waits for groups to load, asserts visible group boundaries at expected world-space positions
Color matches rolled_up_status per display-rules.json: PLANNED green, IN_PROGRESS orange, BLOCKED red, COMPLETE neutral
Display rule overlap resolution correct: DECISION_ZONE rendered on top of TAKT_ZONE when both contain same voxel (DECISION_ZONE has higher base priority)
Manual browser FPS reading >30 fps with all 5 group types rendered (METRICS.txt)
Screenshot captured in _msg/SCREENSHOTS/ for L4 visual review

acceptanceCriteria: SPEC.md authored at the specified path
Includes mission + scope summary + opinionated mapping decision rationale + dependency chain + dev/staging/prod escalation outline

notes: T5 of URO Tier 1 Round 1 per LUHTECH-EB-TIER1-ROS-OVERLAY-STRATEGY-2026-06-07 §8.T5. Substrate-correct critical path: PR 1.1 ✓ → PR 1.2 ✓ → T1 ✓ → T2 ✓ → T3 ✓ → T4 ✓ → T5 ← this → T6. Authored against EB main b9b4141511f806b6746cc8bba0192253b3c06793 + SR main cfcae53f00e394de155826df486ee163253ee382 (post-SR-PR-#170 audit-backlog clearance). Both T5 P1 preconditions cleared: FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 closed via PR 1.2 (EB c356d81... wait — c32c7b14 per substrate, 2026-06-08); FU-EB-USER-WALK-2026-05-22-VOXEL-WRONG-LEVELS-DECISIONS-ORPHANED-1 closed. Full dev → staging → prod escalation embedded in validation.postMerge[] with [STAGE-DEV-N] / [STAGE-STAGING-N] / [STAGE-PROD-N] prefixes; each stage carries explicit L4 named-step gates per memory #4 (no implicit auto-promotion). Per-tarball _msg/ audit bundle structure per strategy doc §9: BUILD.log, TOPICS.txt, PROBES.txt, DB-STATE.txt, SCREENSHOTS/, METRICS.txt, CANARY.txt, BAG-VALIDATION.txt, L4-CHECKLIST.md. L4-CHECKLIST.md maps to OUT-1 through OUT-9 acceptance criteria with PASS/FAIL/EVIDENCE columns. Hard Constraint #1 (n8n PostgreSQL pipeline live) addressed via canary checks pre+post at every escalation stage (DEV, STAGING, PROD). T5 has explicit dependencies on T1 (voxel_groups table + luhtech_msgs base), T2 (luhtech_uro_sim package + rosbag2 wiring), T3 (browser WS client + /dev/uro page), T4 (VoxelGroupOverlay extension + display-rules.json). All four are S8-closed per SR PR #167 + #168 closures. Opinionated occupancy mapping decision (PLANNED→0, IN_PROGRESS→50, BLOCKED→100, COMPLETE→0) is authored opinion per strategy doc §2 'no published convention exists; document explicitly' — DEC entry in decision-log.json captures rationale. Maple Ridge bundle v1.0.0 follows ECTROPY-DEMO-LIBRARY-GOVERNANCE-2026-03-28 RULES 1 + 2 (DB is not library; canonical demo records ID-stable). Canonical project id dc1eaa5b-7553-46ec-92a5-e20762a60c71 preserved per registry. Parent arc d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-ros-overlay-foundation childDeliverables[] currently lists T1-T4 only (SR hygiene item flagged in SR PR #170 comms); amendment to add T5 + T6 references is in-scope of post-T6 parent-arc closure step, not T5 STAGE-PROD scope. Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4: this spec posted to #luhtech-agents-comms with file SHA256 + bytes + validation status; SR-chat lands anchor PR at schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-09-eb-tier1-t5-groups-occupancy.json against canonical deliverable.schema.json v1.2.0; squash-merge fresh L4 named-step. T6 (next sibling) depends on T5 box_simulator (EFAS reads /box/groups/snapshot to compute SDI input vectors); T6 execution gate after T5 reaches S7-merged at minimum, S8-closed preferred. Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
